main_prompt: Cinematic cosplay magazine cover of Ishikawa Mio in dynamic pose, photorealistic human transformation preserving original facial features, Japanese idol debut atmosphere with intimate aesthetic appeal. High-end fashion magazine cover, dense typography layout with layered fonts and textures, commercial photography quality, pheromone atmosphere with sensual allure, high gloss finish, dramatic contrast. 8.5 head-to-body supermodel proportions with S-curve silhouette, porcelain white skin with realistic subsurface scattering, visible pores, fine vellus hair, dewy luminous sheen, voluptuous bust, defined collarbones and elegant neckline, strong feminine magnetism. Japanese muse facial structure blended with Ishikawa Mio’s signature features, soft-focus gaze with inviting eyes, glossy glass-like lips, translucent skin texture, eye catchlights, natural beauty with editorial retouching. Open and alluring body language, inviting eye contact with viewer, natural expressive hand gestures, intimate lover’s perspective angle. Ishikawa Mio’s signature hairstyle rendered as salon-quality real hair with natural weight and gravity flow, organic flyaways, structured styling with subtle anti-gravity volume, backlit rim lighting. High-fidelity recreation of Ishikawa Mio’s original outfit, couture-level fabric translation with luxury textiles, garment-body interaction emphasizing allure, exposed skin areas with delicate luminous sheen. Setting appropriate to Ishikawa Mio’s character world, high-budget film production design, structured yet information-rich background, subtle atmospheric haze, bokeh depth of field. Vertical poster format 2:3 aspect ratio, medium to close-up framing, shallow depth of field, typography as compositional framework with model partially overlapping text layers. Cinematic commercial lighting setup, cool cyan environmental light combined with warm key light on skin tones, hair rim lighting, high contrast for print-ready quality. Typography: Japanese main title with tension and suggestive undertones, “ISHIKAWA MIO” in romaji, English tagline, circular seal, “Jerlin” + issue number, barcode + price tag. Dreamlike, subtly sensual, intimate closeness, erotic tension, romantic gaze. Photorealistic, professional editorial photography, masterpiece, ultra detailed, 8k
style: 高端时尚杂志封面风格，电影级商业摄影，黑暗梦幻与感官诱惑结合，高光泽戏剧对比，专业编辑修图质感，日系偶像出道氛围
key_elements: 石川澪 cosplay、标志性面部特征保留、超模8.5头身S曲线、瓷白皮肤与真实次表面散射、露水光泽与细小绒毛、丰满胸部与优雅锁骨、标志性发型真实质感、原版服装高保真复刻、诱人眼神接触与开放肢体语言、亲密恋人视角
composition: 2:3 竖版杂志封面构图，中近景 framing，浅景深虚化背景，大型人物动态姿势，文字层与人物叠加，密集排版网格设计
lighting_and_colors: 电影商业照明，冷青环境光+暖肤调主光，发丝轮廓光，高对比戏剧阴影，露水高光与光泽质感，梦幻感官氛围
details: 真实皮肤纹理与毛孔、玻璃般唇部与眼神高光、服装面料互动与奢华质感、头发自然飞丝与体积、墨水/颗粒/雾气细节、印刷级高光泽完成度、文字自然融入
negative_prompt: repeated text, text shadows, glowing effects, text outlines, artificial appearance, 3D render look, oversaturated colors, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, blurry, low quality, plastic skin, wig appearance, flat lighting, modern irrelevant elements
